title: light earthy croatian soya milk tagine
description: a light and earthy twist on traditional croatian cuisine, featuring soya milk and a refreshing ice bath

ingredients.name: chopped mushrooms
ingredients.notes: mixture of cremini and shiitake mushrooms, sliced

ingredients.name: chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: chopped leaves and stems, fresh or dried

instructions: heat oil in a large tagine pot over medium heat
add onion, carrot, parsnip, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes
add mushrooms, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper, and cook for 2 minutes
pour in soya milk and bring to a simmer
reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until the liquid has thickened and the flavors have melded together, about 20 minutes
remove from heat and let cool slightly
transfer the tagine to an ice bath to stop the cooking process
let the tagine chill in the ice bath for 10 minutes
serve warm, garnished with chopped parsley
